package rulefixtures

import (
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for cookie_without_secure_flag: `http.Cookie{...}` literals without `Secure: true` for session or authentication cookies
// fixture polarity: positive; family: security; severity: warning.
func scenario703Positive(token string) *http.Cookie {
	return &http.Cookie{Name: "session", Value: token, Path: "/"}
}
